description_long: This is a compact, square-shaped wooden filing cabinet with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The cabinet features a single, large drawer on the front, outlined by a recessed rectangular border, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The top surface is flat and bordered by a subtle lip, making it suitable for placing additional items. The drawer does not have an external handle, instead utilizing a recessed grip along the upper edge for opening. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the exterior, emphasizing its clean design. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for use in organized, professional environments.
description: A square, wood-grain filing cabinet with a single large drawer and a recessed grip, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed rectangular drawer outline and the grip along the top edge.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, with the same recessed drawer outline visible.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view, again showing the recessed drawer outline and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other sides with the same drawer features.
